support.title: Help & Support
support.subject: Subject
support.subjectPlaceholder: What do you need help with?
support.contextNote: App version, device info, and your user ID will be included automatically.
support.successMessage: Thank you! We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
support.errorMessage: Failed to send your request. Please try again.

report.successMessage: Thank you for your report. We'll review it as soon as possible.
report.errorMessage: Failed to submit your report. Please try again.

editScreen.title: Edit Profile
editScreen.errorMessage: Failed to update your profile. Please try again.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.warning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.consequences: Your items, profile, and personal data will be deleted. Conversations and ratings will be anonymized.
deleteAccount.confirmMessage: Type DELETE to confirm account deletion.
deleteAccount.errorMessage: Failed to delete your account. Please try again or contact support.

export.title: Export My Data
export.description: Download a copy of all your data including your profile, inventory, photos, conversations, and more.
export.includedItems: Profile, saved locations, items, bikes, photos, conversations, messages, borrow requests, ratings, groups, notifications, support requests, and subscriptions.
export.processing: Your export is being prepared. We'll notify you when it's ready.
export.readyMessage: Your data export is ready to download.
export.rateLimited: You can request a new export after {{time}}.
export.expired: This export has expired. Request a new one.
